dragon_research.title: Use Dragon Egg Research mechanic (End's Delight) — examine the Dragon Egg to unlock dragon food recipes

dragon_meat.title: Cook and eat Ender Dragon Meat (End's Delight — raw dragon meat drops from the Ender Dragon)

subtitle.text: Dungeon Meshi principle: if you fight it, you should understand it. Understanding starts with eating it.

description: End's Delight adds a full Ender Dragon food chain.
The Dragon Egg unlocks additional End recipes when interacted with.
This is a unique mechanic in End's Delight — the egg is a research catalyst.
Do not place it on the fountain portal. Use it for research first.
Raw Ender Dragon Meat drops from the Ender Dragon on kill.
It cooks into Cooked Ender Dragon Meat in a furnace or smoker.
The meat provides high saturation and unique buffs.
To understand something fully, you must consume it.
The dragon was a guardian. Now it is food.
This is not disrespect. This is comprehension.
→ Cook and eat Ender Dragon Meat [check]
